facade_description: 218R Augusta Ave presents a house-form, semi-detached facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 2 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its house-form, semi-detached typology. The facade reads primarily as concrete, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade is organized as a storefront base with 2 upper-window bays, using double-hung sash windows, and 1 principal entrance. HCD note: Each property has value as a nineteenth-century House-form building that reflects vernacular interpretations of Victorian architectural styles. Through its construction date and typology, each property is directly associated with the District’s early residential development from the 1850s to the ear
